heroHeadline: 45M kg Removed as Right Whale Hits Critically Endangered and High Seas Treaty Enters Force
heroSubtitle: The Ocean Cleanup surpasses 45 million kg of plastic removed — a 10x jump since 2024 — while the IUCN upgrades the North Atlantic Right Whale to Critically Endangered, global ocean protection crosses 10%, and the BBNJ High Seas Treaty becomes binding international law.
footerNote: Data sourced from NOAA, UNEP, The Ocean Cleanup, IUCN, Australian Institute of Marine Science, High Seas Alliance, and major scientific institutions. Coordinates verified against NOAA and OpenStreetMap references.
